title: Open MPI LLM-friendly API catalog record
description: Schema for one JSON object (one line) in openmpi-mpi-api.jsonl. Schema version 1. See specs/llms-friendly-docs/spec.md.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSONL record schema, independent of the Open MPI release.

docset.description: Semantic-only build descriptor. Build identity (git/timestamp) lives only in the manifest.

ompi_version.description: Open MPI version derived from the top-level VERSION file, e.g. v6.1.0a1.

ompi_series.description: Open MPI documentation series, e.g. v6.1.x.

standard.description: MPI Standard version information when known.

version.description: MPI Standard version string, e.g. 4.1, when known.

languages.description: The set of language interfaces for which this record provides bindings; should match the distinct `language` values across `bindings`. JSON Schema validates only enum membership and uniqueness here; the cross-field equality with `bindings[].language` is enforced separately by the CI validator.

bindings.description: One entry per binding variant. May be empty for an extension with no recoverable signature.

procedure.description: Procedure name for this binding, e.g. MPI_Send.

large_count.description: True if this is the large-count ('embiggened', _c) variant.

return_convention.description: How the binding reports errors/results, e.g. 'int return code' (C) or 'ierror argument' (Fortran).

parameters.description: Normalized parameter metadata. For extension records, fields may be 'unknown' or omitted.

url.description: Link to the human error-handling documentation.

documented_with.description: Co-documented procedure names that share this API's man page.

html.description: Canonical human HTML page URL for this procedure.

markdown.description: Per-symbol Markdown page URL for this procedure (every documented procedure has one).

rst.description: Source RST path (relative to the docs source tree) for this procedure's man page.

binding_metadata.description: Origin of the binding metadata, e.g. 'pympistandard' or 'rst' for extensions.

type.description: Datatype/kind of the parameter, when known.

intent.description: Fortran intent or C const-ness, when known.

optional.description: Whether the parameter is optional; the only permitted string is 'unknown' (when not reliably extractable).
